zh.Ros Holderness England: 英國英格蘭越可爾霍爾德內斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Adeline Espec於大約1094年出生在英國越可爾爾姆斯利時，她的父親Walter Espec27歲，母親Adeline de Beauchamp20歲。她和Sir Piers de Ros至少有2個兒子。她去世於1153年之後在她的家鄉，埋葬在英國越可爾爾姆斯利。

zh-hans.Ros Holderness England: 英国英格兰越可爾霍爾德內斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Adeline Espec于大约1094年出生在英国越可爾爾姆斯利时，她的父亲Walter Espec27岁，母亲Adeline de Beauchamp20岁。她和Sir Piers de Ros至少有2个儿子。她去世于1153年之后在她的家乡，埋葬在英国越可爾爾姆斯利。

nameMeanings.name: Espec
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: most likely a topographic name for someone who lived by or owned an area of pasture, derived from Middle High German esban, espan ‘pasture’ (Bavarian and Swabian Espan).
North German and Danish: from a variant of the personal name Jesper, Danish and Low German form of Kasper and Kaspar , equivalents of Casper .

variants.name: Esber
meanings: Arabic (Syria and Lebanon): from Asbir, of unknown meaning, used as a surname. Derivation from Arabic aṣbar ‘very patient’ is linguistically improbable (ṣ and s are not interchangeable). This surname is found among both Muslims and Christians. Compare Esper 4 and Asper 2.

variants.name: Kasper
meanings: German, Danish, and Polish; Slovak (mainly Kašper); Czech and Slovenian (also Kašper): from the personal names Kasper (German, Danish, and Polish) and Kašper (Slovak, Czech, and Slovenian variant of Gašpar, Kašpar, and Gašper, respectively), equivalents of Casper . In North America, this surname is also a shortened and altered form of especially Polish patronymics and other derivatives, e.g. Kasprzak . See also Kaspar , Gaspar , and Gasper .

nameMeanings.name: Adeline
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: diminutive of Adèle ( see Adele ), used occasionally in England from the early 16th century onwards, and now also found in the wider English-speaking world.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Adeline Espec was born about 1094, in Helmsley, Yorkshire, England, her father, Walter Espec, was 27 and her mother, Adeline de Beauchamp, was 20. She had at least 2 sons with Sir Piers de Ros. She died after 1153, in her hometown, and was buried in Helmsley, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adeline Espec est née environ 1094, à Helmsley, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Walter Espec, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Adeline de Beauchamp, avait 20 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils avec Sir Piers de Ros. Elle est décédée après 1153, dans sa ville natale, et a été enterrée à Helmsley, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Adeline Espec um 1094 in Helmsley, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Walter Espec 27 und ihre Mutter Adeline de Beauchamp 20. Sie hatte mit Sir Piers de Ros mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb nach 1153 in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Helmsley, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Adeline Espec è nata il circa 1094 nel Helmsley, Yorkshire, England, sua padre, Walter Espec, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Adeline de Beauchamp, aveva 20 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli con Sir Piers de Ros. Morì dopo il 1153, nel sua cittadina, e fu sepolta a Helmsley, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Adeline Especが約1094年にイギリスヨークシュアイアヘルムスリーで生まれた時，父Walter Especは27歳，母Adeline de Beauchampは20歳であった。彼女はSir Piers de Rosとの間に少なくとも2人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1153年以後に故郷で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアヘルムスリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Adeline Espec(이)가 대략 1094년 영국 요르크실르 헬슬리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Walter Espec(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Adeline de Beauchamp(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 Sir Piers de Ros(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1153년 이후 그녀의 고향에서 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 헬슬리에 묻혔다.

mn.Ros Holderness England: Holderness, Eoferwic, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Adeline Espec nasceu aproximadamente 1094, em Helmsley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Walter Espec, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Adeline de Beauchamp, tinha 20 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos com Sir Piers de Ros. Ela faleceu após 1153, em sua cidade natal, e foi sepultada em Helmsley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adeline Espec родилась около 1094 г. в местности хелмсли, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Walter Espec было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Adeline de Beauchamp, 20. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына от Sir Piers de Ros. Она умерла после 1153 г. в её родном городе и была похоронена в местности хелмсли, еркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Adeline Espec nació aproximadamente 1094, en Helmsley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Walter Espec, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Adeline de Beauchamp, tenía 20 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos con Sir Piers de Ros. Murió después de 1153, en su pueblo, y fue sepultada en Helmsley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
